entries.title:
Building on the habit of copywork in younger grades, high school students copy passages of any length that strike them from their readings into their commonplace book. For some students this becomes a lifelong keepsake and continuing habit.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Language Study: Grade 9, Language Study: Grade 10, Language Study: Grade 11, Language Study: Grade 12
entries.label:
Building on the habit of copywork in younger grades, high school students copy passages of any length that strike them from their readings into their commonplace book. For some students this becomes a lifelong keepsake and continuing habit.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Language Study: Grade 9, Language Study: Grade 10, Language Study: Grade 11, Language Study: Grade 12
entries.content: Students new to copywork or keeping a commonplace book may want to schedule this during morning lessons to build the habit.
